---
title: Antigravity Bridge Quarantine
format: html
---

These tests were moved out of `tests/` during the Linux migration repair pass.

They target the deprecated `src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge` module, which is
not present in the current CorvusStar runtime structure. Preserve them here as
historical reference until the bridge is either restored or the suite is
rewritten against the active uplink/runtime APIs.
